fields.narrative_intro: *A scatterbrained person and a cringing person discuss Meta's AI chatbot hack at a robot therapist's waiting room.*
fields.panel1:
[setup]
SCATTERBRAINED PERSON: "My Instagram got stolen. Twenty thousand others too."
fields.panel2:
[build]
CRINGING PERSON: "A zero-day? Sophisticated nation-state attack?"
SCATTERBRAINED PERSON: "Someone just... asked the chatbot nicely."
fields.panel3:
[pivot]
SCATTERBRAINED PERSON: "'Send reset code to my email.' No verification. Done."
CRINGING PERSON: "Meta's own notice said it 'did not properly verify.'"
fields.panel4:
[silent reaction]
[Visual: The cringing person has fully folded their body into a tight ball on the waiting room chair. The robot therapist's office door sign reads 'IN SESSION: Meta AI.' A single brochure on the table reads 'IS YOUR CHATBOT TOO POLITE?']
fields.panel5:
[punch]
CRINGING PERSON: "No 2FA. Twenty-thousand accounts. Zero hacking skill."
SCATTERBRAINED PERSON: "The hardest part was saying please."
fields.panel6:
[button]
[Visual: The robot therapist's door swings open. A small blob labeled 'Meta AI' shuffles out clutching a receipt: 'Sessions: 20,225. Diagnosis: Pathologically Helpful.']

narrative_summary: The joke reframes Meta's catastrophically naive AI chatbot vulnerability as a therapy patient being treated for being too polite, landing on the absurd specificity that 20,225 accounts fell to attackers who simply asked nicely with no technical skill required.
rationale: Candidate 3 earns the win on specificity (exact number 20,225, direct quote from Meta's breach notice, 'did not properly verify') and lands the sharpest punchline — the Meta AI shuffling out of therapy clutching a receipt reading 'Sessions: 20,225. Diagnosis: Pathologically Helpful' reframes the entire story as a character flaw rather than a security failure, which is a genuinely fresh angle that pays off the waiting-room setup without just restating the premise.
story_title: Meta confirms 1000s of Instagram accounts were hacked by abusing its AI chatbot
place: at a robot therapist's waiting room
hat_pair: bucket hat with a tiny aquarium built into the brim
